mapper.select: SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE TYPE = 0 AND STATUS = 1 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ol.offer_letter_id AS offerLetterId, NVL(COUNT(r.fk_memberid), 0) AS totalSent,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.viewed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS viewedCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.viewed_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unreadCnt,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS acceptCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectCnt
FROM tbl_offer_letter ol LEFT JOIN tbl_offer_submit s ON s.fk_offer_letter_id = ol.offer_letter_id LEFT JOIN tbl_offer_response r ON r.fk_offer_submit_id = s.offer_submit_id
/* 회사 소유 제안서만 */ JOIN tbl_job_posting jp ON jp.job_id = ol.fk_job_id
WHERE jp.fk_memberid = #{companyMemberId}
GROUP BY ol.offer_letter_id ORDER BY ol.offer_letter_id DESC

SELECT l.offer_letter_id AS offerLetterId, l.fk_job_id AS jobId, l.title AS title,
( SELECT s.expire_at FROM tbl_offer_submit s WHERE s.fk_offer_letter_id = l.offer_letter_id ORDER BY s.send_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY ) AS expireAt,
0 AS totalSent, 0 AS viewedCnt, 0 AS acceptCnt, 0 AS rejectCnt, 0 AS unreadCnt
FROM tbl_offer_letter l JOIN tbl_job_posting j ON j.job_id = l.fk_job_id WHERE j.fk_memberid = #{companyMemberId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TEST_OFFER_LETTER.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO TBL_OFFER_LETTER (OFFER_LETTER_ID, FK_JOB_ID, TITLE, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT, UPDATE_AT) VALUES (#{offerLetterId}, #{jobId}, #{title}, #{message}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_OFFER_LETTER SET FK_JOB_ID = #{jobId}, TITLE = #{title}, MESSAGE = #{message}, UPDATE_AT = SYSDATE WHERE OFFER_LETTER_ID = #{offerLetterId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT ( OFFER_SUBMIT_ID, FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID, FK_JOB_ID, TITLE, MESSAGE, EXPIRE_AT, SEND_AT ) SELECT #{offerSubmitId}, ol.OFFER_LETTER_ID, ol.FK_JOB_ID, ol.TITLE, ol.MESSAGE, #{expireAt, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSDATE FROM TBL_OFFER_LETTER ol WHERE ol.OFFER_LETTER_ID = #{offerLetterId}

INSERT INTO TBL_OFFER_RESPONSE ( FK_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID, FK_MEMBERID, RESPONSE_STATUS )
SELECT #{offerSubmitId}, #{mid}, 0 FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.fk_memberid FROM tbl_offer_response r JOIN tbl_offer_submit s ON s.offer_submit_id = r.fk_offer_submit_id WHERE s.fk_offer_letter_id = #{offerLetterId}

SELECT s.fk_offer_letter_id AS offerLetterId, s.offer_submit_id AS offerSubmitId, s.title AS offerTitle,
r.fk_memberid AS memberId, m.name AS receiverName, m.email AS receiverEmail,
s.send_at AS sendAt, r.viewed_at AS viewedAt, r.responded_at AS respondedAt,
r.response_status AS responseStatus,
CASE WHEN r.response_status = 1 THEN '수락' WHEN r.response_status = 2 THEN '거절' ELSE '미응답' END AS responseStatusText
FROM tbl_offer_submit s JOIN tbl_offer_response r ON r.fk_offer_submit_id = s.offer_submit_id LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON m.memberid = r.fk_memberid WHERE s.fk_offer_letter_id = #{offerLetterId} ORDER BY s.send_at DESC, r.fk_memberid ASC

SELECT ol.offer_letter_id AS offerLetterId, ol.fk_job_id AS jobId, jp.fk_memberid AS companyMemberId, jp.status AS jobStatus, jp.opened_at AS openedAt, jp.deadline_at AS deadlineAt, jp.closed_at AS closedAt FROM tbl_offer_letter ol JOIN tbl_job_posting jp ON jp.job_id = ol.fk_job_id WHERE ol.offer_letter_id = #{offerLetterId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_member WHERE type = 0 AND status = 1 AND memberid IN
#{mid}

SELECT DISTINCT r.fk_memberid FROM tbl_offer_response r JOIN tbl_offer_submit s ON s.offer_submit_id = r.fk_offer_submit_id WHERE s.fk_offer_letter_id = #{offerLetterId} AND r.fk_memberid IN
#{mid}
